pi_items.source: CDC clinical guidance and medical literature confirm Amoxicillin is standard treatment for strep throat; real medication
Web search on CDC and medical sources confirms 500mg is standard adult dosage for strep throat treatment
Task prescribes 3 capsules daily for 10 days: 3 × 10 = 30 capsules. Standard calculation for strep throat course.

Task description (line 22) explicitly states: 'Save this as a Favorite (or to your Favorites list) with the name: Strep Throat - Amox 500'. Metadata only claims substring 'Strep Throat' (verifier uses substring matching in verifier.py line 83).
CDC and medical sources confirm this is the standard adult dosing for strep throat: 500mg three times daily for minimum 10 days to prevent acute rheumatic fever

privileged_info_summary: This task creates a prescription favorite in Oscar EMR for Amoxicillin 500mg, a real antibiotic. The prescription details are medically accurate: 500mg taken three times daily for 10 days is the standard adult treatment for strep throat, yielding 30 tablets total. Provider number 999998 is verified as the oscardoc user (Dr. Sarah Chen). The patient Mario Rossi is synthetically created for this task. The metadata claim for favorite name 'Strep Throat' is incomplete; the task explicitly requires the full name 'Strep Throat - Amox 500', though the verifier uses substring matching which allows the task to pass.
